mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Guardianship of Cordelia Phillips, Now Dalton, ward turned 21 on 03.16.1893
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Guardianship of Cordelia Phillips, Now Dalton, ward turned 21 on 03.16.1893 Henderson C. Phillips, Guardian Recorded in Ledger Book 4, Page 229-230, in the Floyd County Courthouse.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
